label_batches.label: construction_blocked
label_batches.recipe: Natural outcome from failed construction/static candidates; record exact verifier/shape failure.

label_batches.label: raw_accept_unconfirmed
label_batches.recipe: Only record when a repeated microbench clears its predeclared bar but no full-decode confirmation exists yet; do not force this label.

mechanism_batches.recipe: Run packed_word_lane_unroll on additional Q4_K tensors/roles; require generated-source load-width report before timing.
Repeat the block-local semantic op compile gate on more dominant Q4_K tensors, then microbench only compile-shape passes.
Run reduce_unroll schedule candidates on fresh tensors/models as a post-Phase-3E train batch.
Run row_upcast schedule candidates on fresh tensors/models as a post-Phase-3E train batch.
Run two_dim_local schedule candidates on fresh tensors/models as a post-Phase-3E train batch.
Collect construction outcomes for schedulable vector-load candidates, with source-shape evidence and no full decode unless gates pass.
Run wide-load-only/vector-load controls on additional tensors to bound the branch without runtime integration.

notes: Rows must be real candidate outcomes, not duplicated holdout rows or synthetic labels.
The existing family-split holdout remains valid; new post-Phase-3E outcomes should form a dated train/rolling-shadow batch.
Full decode remains gated by the normal static, correctness, microbench, and confirmation rules.
rerun_blockers: missing or thin label train coverage
current featured dataset does not add new outcomes
